_comment: toolbelt's base catalog overlays: curated entries merged over the
mise+aqua registry data by cmd/toolcatalog at a consumer's image
build. Entries WITHOUT a source patch display fields (featured, lsp,
description, requires, shims, probe) onto the compiled entry;
entries WITH a source replace/create the whole entry (aqua: sources
pull their definition from the aqua registry checkout; manual
sources carry an install command). Manual install commands run
under bash with VERSION, VERSION_NOPFX (leading v stripped), BIN,
TOOLS, OPT and the ARCH_*_OR_* naming-convention variables in the
environment (value = left side on amd64, right side on arm64).
Consumers layer app-specific overlays with additional -overlay flags.

node.description: Node.js runtime. Required for npm-installed tools and npx-based servers.

go.description: Go toolchain. Required for gopls and go-installed tools.

uv.description: Python package runner (uv). Provides uvx for Python MCP servers and installs pip-sourced tools.

gh.description: GitHub CLI for PR creation, repo cloning, and authenticated git operations.

golangci-lint.description: Go meta-linter and formatter runner (bundles gofumpt and gci). Verified against upstream release checksums.

typescript.description: The TypeScript compiler package (tsserver). Dependency of typescript-language-server.

typescript-language-server.description: TypeScript/JavaScript LSP (Microsoft canonical, via npm). Full tsc compatibility; pick tsc-native below for ~10x faster type-checking.

pyright.description: Python LSP (Microsoft official, via npm). Full pyright fidelity; pick pyrefly below for native speed.

pyrefly.description: Python LSP (Meta's pyrefly, native Rust binary, ~18 MB, no Node needed). Shimmed as pyright for kiro-cli; ~95% diagnostic-equivalent to Microsoft's pyright.

tsc-native.description: TypeScript 7 native compiler (Go-compiled tsc from the stable typescript package). Self-contained, no Node needed; shimmed as typescript-language-server for kiro-cli. Pick typescript-language-server above for 100% tsc fidelity.

gopls.description: Go LSP (gopls), installed via go install.

rust-analyzer.description: Rust LSP. Standalone binary; installing the rust toolchain unlocks full project analysis.

clangd.description: C/C++ LSP (~160 MB). Reads compile_commands.json from your workspace. Upstream ships x86_64 builds only — not available on arm64 hosts.
clangd.install: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL -o "$tmp/clangd.zip" "https://github.com/clangd/clangd/releases/download/${VERSION}/clangd-linux-${VERSION}.zip" && unzip -q "$tmp/clangd.zip" -d "$tmp" && cp "$tmp/clangd_${VERSION}/bin/clangd" "${BIN}/clangd" && chmod 755 "${BIN}/clangd" && rm -rf "$tmp"

java.description: OpenJDK 21 JRE (Eclipse Temurin). Required by jdtls and kotlin-language-server; shared between them.
java.install: safe_tag=$(printf '%s' "${VERSION}" | sed 's/+/%2B/g') && rel=$(printf '%s' "${VERSION}" | sed 's/jdk-//;s/+/_/') && curl -fsSL "https://github.com/adoptium/temurin21-binaries/releases/download/${safe_tag}/OpenJDK21U-jre_${ARCH_X86_64_OR_AARCH64}_linux_hotspot_${rel}.tar.gz" | tar -xz -C "${OPT}" --strip-components=1 && ln -sf "${OPT}/bin/java" "${BIN}/java" && ln -sf "${OPT}/bin/keytool" "${BIN}/keytool"

rust.description: Rust toolchain (rustup + rustc + cargo, minimal profile). Required for cargo-installed tools and full rust-analyzer analysis.
rust.install: curl -fsSL https://sh.rustup.rs | RUSTUP_HOME="${OPT}/rustup" CARGO_HOME="${OPT}/cargo" sh -s -- -y --default-toolchain stable --profile minimal --no-modify-path && for b in cargo rustc rustup; do ln -sf "${OPT}/cargo/bin/$b" "${BIN}/$b"; done

jdtls.description: Java LSP (Eclipse JDT language server). Requires the java runtime.

kotlin-language-server.description: Kotlin LSP. Requires the java runtime (shared with jdtls).
kotlin-language-server.install:
tmp=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL -o "$tmp/kls.zip" "https://github.com/fwcd/kotlin-language-server/releases/download/${VERSION}/server.zip" && rm -rf "${OPT}/dist" && unzip -q "$tmp/kls.zip" -d "${OPT}" && mv "${OPT}/server" "${OPT}/dist" && rm -rf "$tmp" && printf '#!/bin/sh
export JAVA_HOME="%s/opt/java"
exec "%s/dist/bin/kotlin-language-server" "$@"
' "${TOOLS}" "${OPT}" > "${BIN}/kotlin-language-server" && chmod 755 "${BIN}/kotlin-language-server"
